appearance.languageSaveFailed: Couldn't save the language. Please try again.
appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Choose a light or dark theme. The choice is saved locally in your browser.

installApp.title: App
installApp.description: Install SimpleCRM as an app — it opens in its own window right from your home screen.

appearance.label: Appearance
appearance.description: Theme, colors, and other visual settings.

integrations.label: Integrations
integrations.description: Connections to external services and sending emails (SMTP).

organization.label: Organization
organization.description: Contracted user count and billing method.

users.label: Users
users.description: Manage roles, team membership, and member activity.

invitations.label: Invitations
invitations.description: Invite new members and manage permissions.

permissions.label: Permissions
permissions.description: Rules for who can do what in the app.

pipeline.label: Pipeline
pipeline.description: Manage pipeline stages and their order.

blocked-companies.label: Blocked company IDs
blocked-companies.description: List of company IDs (IČO) salespeople can't add as a company.

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.description: History of the SimpleCRM team's access to your data, and organization deletion.

billing.label: Billing
billing.description: Plan, invoice, and payment method details.

importItem.label: Import from CSV
importItem.description: Bulk import of companies and contacts from CSV files.

layout.title: Settings
layout.gcalFailed: Google Calendar connection failed, please try again

operatorAccess.title: Operator access
operatorAccess.bodyPrefix: Authorized SimpleCRM operator staff have limited access to your data for support, incident response, and maintenance purposes. Every such access is logged and shown in the table below. Details on the operator's obligations are in
operatorAccess.linkText: Art. 5 of the Data Processing Agreement
operatorAccess.empty: No access has been logged. If anyone from the SimpleCRM team ever views your data, a new entry will appear here.

dangerZone.title: Permanently delete organization
dangerZone.body1: Irreversibly deletes all personal data: contacts, companies, deals, activities, and user accounts. Issued tax documents are retained for a further 10 years as required by law under § 31 of the Accounting Act — without your access credentials.
dangerZone.body2: Before deleting, we recommend exporting your data from the Reports section. Any active subscription will be automatically cancelled as part of the deletion.

eraseDialog.title: Permanently delete organization?
eraseDialog.confirmBody: This action can't be undone. To confirm, type the organization's exact name:

blockedCompanies.title: Blocked company IDs
blockedCompanies.subtitle: Salespeople can't add a company with this ID (IČO). We'll fill in the name from ARES.

errors.invalidIco: The company ID (IČO) must have 8 digits.
errors.duplicate: This company ID is already on the blocked list.

blockedCompanies.empty: Nothing yet. Add the first company ID above.
blockedCompanies.removeConfirm: Remove company ID {{ico}} from the blocked list?

permissionDenied.title: Invitations
permissionDenied.body: Invitations can be managed by an administrator or a user with the "Can invite others" permission.

invite.title: Invite a user
invite.subtitle: We'll send an email with a link the invitee can use to sign in with Google and automatically join your organization.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage roles, team membership, and activity of your organization's members.
users.cancelQueueConfirm: This will cancel the entire planned user-count change. Continue?

table.capLimitTitle: Maximum number of companies this salesperson may hold at once. Empty = no limit.

users.managerBadgeTitle: This user manages these teams. Open the Teams tab to change it.
users.canInviteTitleOther: When checked, this user can send invitations.
users.capTitle: Maximum number of companies this user may own at once. Empty = no limit.
users.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate user {{name}}? They will lose access to the app immediately.
users.scheduledPillTitle: This user will lose access on {{date}}.

teams.title: Teams
teams.subtitle: Teams group salespeople under a manager, who sees the whole team's pipeline.

smtp.title: Sending emails (SMTP)
smtp.subtitle: Bulk emails are sent from your own mailbox. Enter your SMTP server credentials and verify the connection.
smtp.saveSuccess: SMTP settings saved. Test the connection.
smtp.saveErrorDetailed: Saving failed — check the entered details.
smtp.testError: The test failed, please try again.

invoiceDetails.title: Invoice details
invoiceDetails.subtitle: This information appears on your tax documents. Enter your company ID (IČO) and we'll fill in the rest from ARES — every field can then be edited.

seatCount.title: Contracted user count
seatCount.subtitle: You currently have {{activeCount}} active users out of {{seatCount}} contracted. The limit affects how many invitations can be sent and matches the billed price.

pendingBanner.text: Planned change: the count will drop to {{count}}.
pendingBanner.textWithDate: Planned change: the count will drop to {{count}} on {{date}}.
pendingBanner.loseAccess: Will lose access: {{names}}. Until then they fully keep their paid seats.

seatCount.willLoseAccess_one: After the current period{{dateSuffix}}, {{count}} user will lose access.
seatCount.willLoseAccess_other: After the current period{{dateSuffix}}, {{count}} users will lose access.
seatCount.deactivateHint: Choose who. You can't remove yourself. Selected people keep full access until the end of the period; deactivation happens at the next billing cycle. The account stays in the database (for data history), but sign-in ends.
seatCount.noEligible: Can't go below 1 — you're the only active user.

error.range: The value must be between 1 and 500.
error.needsSelectAll: Lowering to {{target}} will lose access for {{required}} users — select exactly {{required}}.
error.connection: Something went wrong. Check your connection.

billingInterval.title: Billing method
billingInterval.subtitleTemplate: The change takes effect {{when}}. It doesn't affect the current period.

annual.title: Annual
annual.subtitleWithSavings: Billed once a year, save 16% — {{amount}} / year

billingInterval.pendingNotice: You're currently billed {{current}}. At the next period you'll switch to {{pending}} billing.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect SimpleCRM with the tools you already use.

googleCalendar.title: Google Calendar
googleCalendar.subtitle: Deal events can also be written to your Google Calendar on request.
googleCalendar.needsReconnect: Google access was revoked — please reconnect the calendar.
googleCalendar.connectErrorToast: Couldn't start the connection, please try again

ares.name: ARES
ares.body: Automatically fills in company details from the public registry.

slack.name: Slack
slack.body: Notifications about won deals into a team channel.

webhooks.name: Webhooks
webhooks.body: Send events (deal won / company freed) to your own URL.

visibility.title: Visibility
visibility.subtitle: What each role sees in Reports and on the Dashboard.

leaderboard.label: Show the leaderboard to salespeople
leaderboard.subtitle: When off, salespeople in Reports only see their own results. Managers and administrators always see the leaderboard.

companyRules.title: Company rules
companyRules.subtitle: How long before inactive companies fall back to managers for reassignment.

ownershipWindow.label: Company holding period (days)
ownershipWindow.subtitle: After this period without a won deal, the company is automatically released from the salesperson's pool back to managers for reassignment. The default is 365 days (1 year). Allowed range 1–3650 days.

error.range: The value must be between 1 and 3650 days.

table.title: Permissions
table.subtitle: Permissions are fixed in this version. Let us know if you need custom roles.

rows.viewAllDeals: See all deals across the pipeline
rows.deleteCompanies: Delete companies and release from the pool

page.title: Bulk import
page.subtitle: Upload one or more CSV files. For each, we'll check what it contains and you'll confirm the field mapping. You'll always see a preview before committing.

upload.dropzoneText: Drop CSV files here or click to choose
upload.dropzoneHint: You can upload several files at once (companies, contacts, or both in one).

errors.missingHeaderRow: The CSV has no header row.
errors.emptyHeaderRow: The CSV header row is empty.

mapping.matchKeyLabel: Column to link to the company

matchSource.legend: Key to match contacts to a company
matchSource.name: Company name
matchSource.hint: A contact finds its company by this value — either among companies in the uploaded files, or among companies you already have in the CRM. So you can upload just contacts.

bulkOwner.legend: Assign one salesperson to all imported companies
bulkOwner.overrideWarning: The "Salesperson" column is enabled in the mapping, but bulk assignment takes precedence — the column will be ignored.
bulkOwner.hint: Without enabling this, companies will either have no owner (shared pool) or get an owner from the "Salesperson" column in the CSV (email or name).

mappingTable.emptyMessage: Upload a CSV in the previous step so we have columns to map.

preview.skipUnmatchedLabel: Skip unmatched contacts without an error message
preview.skipUnmatchedHint: If checked, contacts with no matching company are skipped — error messages won't block the import. Otherwise the import treats them as errors and only writes the successful rows.
